summary: Tested Trial Balance Report feature - all backend API tests pass (9/9), frontend UI tests pass. The Trial Balance page loads correctly at /finance/trial-balance with all required features working: period filters (Month, Quarter, FY, Custom), account groups (Assets, Liabilities, Income, Expenses, Equity), summary cards, Grand Total row with balance status indicator, and export buttons.
passed_tests: GET /api/finance/trial-balance?period=month returns correct data
GET /api/finance/trial-balance?period=quarter returns correct data
GET /api/finance/trial-balance?period=fy returns correct data
GET /api/finance/trial-balance?period=custom with date range returns correct data
Account groups structure (assets, liabilities, income, expenses, equity) is correct
Totals calculation (total_debit, total_credit, difference) is accurate
Summary values (total_income, total_expenses, net_profit_loss) are correct
Unauthenticated requests return 401
Default period is 'month' when not specified
Trial Balance page loads at /finance/trial-balance
Sidebar shows Trial Balance tab under Finance menu
Period filter dropdown works (This Month, This Quarter, Financial Year, Custom Range)
Summary cards display Total Income, Total Expenses, Net Profit/Loss, Balance Status
Assets section displays with Account Name, Debit, Credit columns
Liabilities section displays correctly
Income section displays correctly
Expenses section displays correctly
Equity section displays correctly
Grand Total row shows at bottom with Debit and Credit totals
Balance Status indicator shows Balanced/Mismatch with appropriate styling
Excel export button is visible and clickable
PDF export button is visible and clickable
Custom date range inputs appear when Custom Range is selected
critical_code_review_comments: Backend API at /api/finance/trial-balance (server.py lines 28114-28397) correctly implements trial balance calculation
Frontend TrialBalance.jsx properly displays all account groups with correct structure
Period filters (month, quarter, fy, custom) work correctly with proper date range calculation
Export functionality (Excel/PDF) implemented client-side without backend dependency
Balance status indicator correctly shows Balanced (green) or Mismatch (red) based on totals
Sidebar correctly includes Trial Balance entry at line 75 in Sidebar.jsx
seed_data_creation: Used existing accounting_transactions data for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trial Balance feature fully tested. Backend endpoint: GET /api/finance/trial-balance with period query param (month, quarter, fy, custom). Frontend page at /finance/trial-balance with data-testid attributes: trial-balance-page, period-select, export-excel-btn, export-pdf-btn, trial-balance-content, custom-start-date, custom-end-date, apply-custom-dates, refresh-trial-balance. Sidebar entry at /finance/trial-balance with nav-finance-trial-balance data-testid.

backend_api.Totals calculation: WORKING - total_debit, total_credit, difference, is_balanced calculated correctly
backend_api.Summary values: WORKING - total_income, total_expenses, net_profit_loss calculated correctly

frontend_ui.account_groups: WORKING - Assets, Liabilities, Income, Expenses, Equity sections with tables
